nodes.dropLossBasis: Observed cPoC drop loss: sum of positive confirmed-weight drops across saved cPoC checkpoints / total epoch weight * epoch reward.
nodes.estimatedLostBasis: No observed positive confirmation-weight drop allocation.
nodes.sourceCompensationBasis: max(0, entry weight / total epoch weight * epoch reward - actual rewards).

payoutEstimates.allocationBasis: Exact unpaid pool allocated across address-level positive confirmation-weight drops.
payoutEstimates.precision: Estimate only; proof-grade per-host amount requires settlement replay.
payoutEstimates.sourceCompensationBasis: Epoch 265 source model from known counterfactual set.

warnings: epoch summary rows and performance rewards agree; source compensation is a counterfactual model.
Source compensation is a counterfactual model, not a direct gov-wallet remainder allocation.
Drop-allocation estimates remain diagnostic only and are not shown as primary compensation values.
Chain data shows confirmation-weight drops and settlement effects; attack attribution is investigation context.
